phase1_health_check.grampsweb_initial: 503, self-signed cert (Coolify never had a Traefik router for gramps.redsquatch.com)
phase1_health_check.root_cause: grampsweb service only had the auto-generated sslip.io domain configured in Coolify; gramps.redsquatch.com was never added
phase1_health_check.fix_applied: Added gramps.redsquatch.com as the service domain via Coolify API (PATCH /api/v1/services), triggered instant_deploy
phase1_health_check.grampsweb_final: 200, valid Let's Encrypt cert (issuer: Let's Encrypt YR2, expires 2026-10-04)
phase1_health_check.stirling_pdf: 401 (expected - has its own login page), already correctly configured at pdf.redsquatch.com with valid cert

deviations_from_original_spec: RightToolbar.tsx did not exist in the codebase; per user decision, launcher buttons were added to the existing app/dashboard/tools/page.tsx instead of creating a new toolbar component
Checkpoint written to project directory instead of /root/audits/ because that directory is root-owned and not writable by the RedSquatch user
next_steps: test on localhost (npm run dev), click Grampsweb and Stirling-PDF cards on /dashboard/tools, verify iframe loads and modal close/click-outside works
